title: Particle & VFX System Architecture
description: Covers the GPU particle system in ID Tech 7: per-particle simulation using compute shader workgroups, particle sorting by depth for correct blending, GPU emitter spawning driven by simulated events, and the chaos VFX system that integrates physics-based fracture simulation with GPU particle emission. High-density GPU particles are a defining visual element of DOOM Eternal's VFX style; the system architecture enables hundreds of thousands of simultaneous particles at 60 FPS. Students will implement a GPU particle system with compute-based simulation and depth-sorted transparency in the GP Engine, add emitter spawning via a GPU event buffer, and profile the sorting overhead versus a CPU-sorted baseline.
